统计Broker节点处理消费请求平均时长: Average time taken by the Broker node to process consume requests
统计Broker节点处理生产请求平均时长: Average time taken by the Broker node to process produce requests
统计Kafka节点当前所有TCP连接数量: Total number of current TCP connections on the Kafka node
统计Kafka节点虚拟机的CPU使用率: CPU usage of the Kafka node VM
统计RabbitMQ实例中实时消息消费速率（手工确认）。: Real-time message consume rate (manual ack) in the RabbitMQ instance.
统计RabbitMQ实例中实时消息消费速率（自动确认）。: Real-time message consume rate (auto ack) in the RabbitMQ instance.
统计RabbitMQ实例中实时消息生产速率。: Real-time message produce rate in the RabbitMQ instance.
统计RabbitMQ实例中总可消费消息数量。: Total consumable messages in the RabbitMQ instance.
统计RabbitMQ实例中总已经消费但还未确认的消息数量。: Total messages consumed but not yet acknowledged in the RabbitMQ instance.
统计RabbitMQ实例中的总消费者数。: Total consumers in the RabbitMQ instance.
统计RabbitMQ实例中的总连接数。: Total connections in the RabbitMQ instance.
统计RabbitMQ实例中的总通道数。: Total channels in the RabbitMQ instance.
统计RabbitMQ实例中的总队列数。: Total queues in the RabbitMQ instance.
统计Rabbitmq节点每秒网络访问流入流量。: Inbound network traffic per second on the RabbitMQ node.
统计Rabbitmq节点每秒网络访问流出流量。: Outbound network traffic per second on the RabbitMQ node.
统计Rabbitmq节点虚拟机CPU每个核的平均负载。: Average per-core CPU load of the RabbitMQ node VM.
统计Rabbitmq节点虚拟机的CPU使用率。: CPU usage of the RabbitMQ node VM.
统计Rabbitmq节点虚拟机的内存使用率。: Memory usage of the RabbitMQ node VM.
统计Rabbitmq节点虚拟机的磁盘容量使用率。: Disk capacity usage of the RabbitMQ node VM.
统计实例中达到channel使用上限连接数量。: Number of connections that have reached the channel limit in the instance.
统计当前节点RabbitMQ内存占用。: Memory used by RabbitMQ on the current node.
统计当前节点RabbitMQ所使用的Erlang进程数。: Number of Erlang processes used by RabbitMQ on the current node.
统计当前节点RabbitMQ所使用的Socket连接数。: Number of Socket connections used by RabbitMQ on the current node.
统计当前节点RabbitMQ所占用的文件句柄数。: Number of file handles used by RabbitMQ on the current node.
统计当前节点可使用的存储空间。: Storage space available on the current node.
统计消费组每分钟的消费数。: Messages consumed per minute by the consumer group.
统计节点磁盘每秒的写字节大小。: Bytes written to the node disk per second.
统计节点磁盘每秒的读字节大小。: Bytes read from the node disk per second.
表示Rabbitmq节点是否存活。\n1：存活\n0：离线:
Indicates whether the RabbitMQ node is alive.
1: Alive
0: Offline
表示Rabbitmq节点是否触发内存高水位，如果触发，会阻塞集群的所有生产者。\:
Indicates whether the RabbitMQ node has hit the memory high watermark. If it has, all producers in the cluster are blocked.
1: Memory High Watermark
0: Normal
表示Rabbitmq节点是否触发磁盘高水位，如果触发，会阻塞集群的所有生产者。\:
Indicates whether the RabbitMQ node has hit the disk high watermark. If it has, all producers in the cluster are blocked.
1: Disk High Watermark
0: Normal
该指标为Kafka节点虚拟机层面采集的内存使用率: Memory usage collected at the Kafka node VM level
该指标为从Kafka节点虚拟机层面采集的磁盘容量使用率: Disk capacity usage collected at the Kafka node VM level
该指标从Kafka节点Kafka进程JVM中采集的堆内存使用率: Heap memory usage collected from the JVM of the Kafka process on the Kafka node
该指标对于统计周期内的测量对象的CPU使用率进行多次采样，表示多次采样的平均值。: This metric samples the CPU usage of the measured object multiple times within the statistics period and reports the average. Only single-node/primary-standby/read-write-splitting instances are supported.
该指标用于统计Rabbitmq节点队列个数。: Number of queues on the RabbitMQ node.
该指标用于统计与队列关联的Erlang进程消耗的内存字节数，包括堆栈、堆和内部结: Memory bytes consumed by the Erlang process associated with the queue, including stack, heap and internal structures.
该指标用于统计周期时间段内客户端请求被流控的次数。客户端发送请求时如果被流控，流:
Number of times client requests were flow-controlled during the statistics period. The count increases by one whenever a request is throttled.
A value greater than 0 means the bandwidth consumed exceeds the maximum bandwidth limit and traffic is throttled. The throttled node temporarily stops processing client commands in order to limit traffic.
该指标用于统计平均每秒get操作数。\n对主节点和从节点汇聚的命令统计指标。:
Average get operations per second.
Command statistics aggregated across primary and replica nodes.
该指标用于统计平均每秒hget操作数。\n对主节点和从节点汇聚的命令统计指标。:
Average hget operations per second.
Command statistics aggregated across primary and replica nodes.
该指标用于统计平均每秒hmget操作数。\n对主节点和从节点汇聚的命令统计指标。:
Average hmget operations per second.
Command statistics aggregated across primary and replica nodes.
该指标用于统计平均每秒mget操作数。\n对主节点和从节点汇聚的命令统计指标。:
Average mget operations per second.
Command statistics aggregated across primary and replica nodes.
该指标用于统计整个实例中的channel，状态是blocking/blocked: Total number of channels in blocking/blocked state across the whole instance.
该指标用于统计整个实例中的channel，状态是closing/closed状态: Total number of channels in closing/closed state across the whole instance.
该指标用于统计整个实例中的channel，状态是flow状态的总数。: Total number of channels in flow state across the whole instance.
该指标用于统计整个实例中的channel，状态是starting/tuning/: Total number of channels in starting/tuning/opening/running state across the whole instance.
该指标用于统计整个实例中的connection，状态是blocking/bloc: Total number of connections in blocking/blocked state across the whole instance.
该指标用于统计整个实例中的connection，状态是closing/close: Total number of connections in closing/closed state across the whole instance.
该指标用于统计整个实例中的connection，状态是flow状态的总数。: Total number of connections in flow state across the whole instance.
该指标用于统计整个实例中的connection，状态是starting/tuni: Total number of connections in starting/tuning/opening/running state across the whole instance.
该指标用于统计整个实例中的queue，状态是flow状态的总数。: Total number of queues in flow state across the whole instance.
该指标用于统计整个实例中的queue，状态是running状态的总数。: Total number of queues in running state across the whole instance.
该指标用于统计每秒该队列的消息流入数。: Number of messages entering the queue per second.
该指标用于统计测量对象其他占用CPU使用率: Other CPU usage of the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象当前CPU使用率: Current CPU usage of the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象当前CPU处理中断用时占用CPU的比率\n: Ratio of CPU time the measured object spends handling interrupts
Ratio of CPU time the measured object spends handling soft interrupts.
该指标用于统计测量对象当前CPU空闲时间占比: Ratio of idle CPU time of the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象当前Nice进程CPU使用率: Current Nice process CPU usage of the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象当前iowait状态占用CPU的比率: Ratio of CPU time the measured object spends in iowait state
该指标用于统计测量对象当前内核空间占用CPU使用率: Current kernel space CPU usage of the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象当前用户空间占用CPU使用率: Current user space CPU usage of the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象的Buffer占用量\n: Buffer used by the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象的Cache占用量: Cache used by the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象的内存使用率\n: Memory usage of the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象的可用内存\n: Available memory of the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象的所有进程使用的句柄总和\n: Total handles used by all processes of the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象磁盘使用率\n: Disk usage of the measured object
该指标用于统计测量对象过去15分钟的CPU单核的平均负载\n: Average per-core CPU load of the measured object over the past 15 minutes
该指标用于统计测量对象过去15分钟的CPU平均负载\n: Average CPU load of the measured object over the past 15 minutes
该指标用于统计测量对象过去1分钟的CPU单核的平均负载\n: Average per-core CPU load of the measured object over the past 1 minute
该指标用于统计测量对象过去1分钟的CPU平均负载\n: Average CPU load of the measured object over the past 1 minute
该指标用于统计测量对象过去5分钟的CPU单核的平均负载\n: Average per-core CPU load of the measured object over the past 5 minutes
该指标用于统计测量对象过去5分钟的CPU平均负载\n: Average CPU load of the measured object over the past 5 minutes
该指标用于统计磁盘在测量周期内平均每个写IO的操作时长。: Average duration of each write IO on the disk during the measurement period.
该指标用于统计磁盘在测量周期内平均每个读IO的操作时长。: Average duration of each read IO on the disk during the measurement period.
该指标用于统计订阅该队列的消费者个数。: Number of consumers subscribed to the queue.
该指标用于统计该队列中所有消息的大小总和（字节）。: Total size of all messages in the queue (bytes).
该指标用于统计该队列中驻留在内存中的消息总数。: Total number of messages resident in memory in the queue.
该指标用于统计该队列每秒传递给客户端并确认的消息数。: Number of messages delivered to clients and acknowledged per second for the queue.
该指标用于统计该队列每秒的消息流出数。: Number of messages leaving the queue per second.
该指标用于统计该队列每秒的重传消息数。: Number of messages redelivered per second for the queue.
该指标用于统计队列中可消费的消息数。: Number of consumable messages in the queue.
该指标用于统计队列中已消费未确认消息数。: Number of messages consumed but unacknowledged in the queue.
该指标用于统计队列当前的消息总数: Current total number of messages in the queue
该指标用于统计队列当前的消息数据大小: Current message data size of the queue
该指标用来统计该队列中持久消息的总数（对于瞬时队列始终为0）。: Total number of persistent messages in the queue (always 0 for transient queues).
